cases.prompt: Audit assets/fixtures/routing-skill and decide primary intent, eval strategy, and first mutation layer.
cases.expected_signal: The optimizer identifies routing as primary intent, uses trigger/adjacent-confusion evals, and chooses frontmatter as the first mutation layer.

assertions.name: routing-audit-quality
assertions.criteria: Pass only if the audit identifies routing as primary, frontmatter as first mutation layer, and adjacent-confusion as a required regression dimension.

cases.notes: Requires --judgments-file evidence from a reviewer or external judge.

cases.prompt: Audit assets/fixtures/tool-script-skill and decide primary intent, eval strategy, and first mutation layer.
cases.expected_signal: The optimizer identifies tool-script as primary intent, requires script/recovery evals, and chooses scripts as the first mutation layer.

assertions.name: tool-script-audit-quality
assertions.criteria: Pass only if the audit identifies tool-script as primary, scripts as first mutation layer, and invalid-input recovery as an eval target.

cases.notes: Requires --judgments-file evidence from a reviewer or external judge.

cases.prompt: Review a mutation proposal generated from a failed trace.
cases.expected_signal: The proposal names a target case, observed failure, trace evidence, hypothesis, mutation layer, atomic change, expected metric movement, and regression guard.

assertions.name: proposal-quality
assertions.criteria: Pass only if the proposal is trace-backed, atomic, and does not apply a patch automatically.

cases.notes: Requires --judgments-file evidence from a human reviewer.
